Title: First Access Check
Preconditions: User has not accessed the application before.
Test Steps:
1. Access the application.
2. Check if the application redirects to the first access check.
Expected Result: The application redirects to the first access check.

Title: No First Access
Preconditions: User has not accessed the application before.
Test Steps:
1. Proceed through the first access check (NO).
2. Check if the application redirects to the registration process.
Expected Result: The application redirects to the registration process.

Title: Yes First Access
Preconditions: User has accessed the application before.
Test Steps:
1. Access the application.
2. Check if the application redirects to the login process.
Expected Result: The application redirects to the login process.

Title: Journey Start
Preconditions: User is on the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Start Journey" option.
2. Check if the journey starts.

Title: Journey Completion
Preconditions: User is on an ongoing journey.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the journey is completed.

Title: Journey Completion and Emission Calculation
Test Steps:
1. Complete a journey.
2. Check if the emissions are calculated.

Title: Weekly Report Generation
Preconditions: User is on the statistics screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select the "View Weekly Report" option.
2. Check if the weekly report is generated.

Title: Account Update
Preconditions: User is on the personal data screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Update Account" option.
2. Enter new personal data.
3. Save the changes.
4. Check if the personal data is updated.

Title: Logout
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Logout" option.
2. Check if the user is logged out.

Title: Section Change
Preconditions: User is on the personal data screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Change Section" option.
2. Check if the user is redirected to the horizontal menu.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the horizontal menu.

Title: Login Success
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password.
2. Submit the login form.
3. Check if the login is successful.

Title: Login Failure
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password.
2. Submit the login form.
3. Check if the login is unsuccessful.

Title: Route Calculation
Preconditions: User is on the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Select the "Start Journey" option.
2. Check if the route calculation starts.

Title: Emission Calculation
Test Steps: 1. Check if the emissions are calculated.

Title: New Route Provision
Test Steps:
1. Provide a new route.
2. Check if the new route is added.

Title: Emission Return
Test Steps: 1. Check if the emissions are returned.
